title: US NATO Allies Refuse Trump's Request to Send Warships to Strait of Hormuz
detail: European NATO allies rebuffed President Trump's appeals to deploy warships to the Strait of Hormuz to help secure oil transit lanes disrupted by the US-Iran conflict. Germany's spokesman for Chancellor Friedrich Merz stated: 'This war has nothing to do with NATO. It is not NATO's war.' The refusal highlighted limits on trans-Atlantic solidarity and underscored European reluctance to be drawn into the Middle East conflict. Trump reportedly warned that countries that refuse to help 'will be remembered.'
